import os
import tarfile

def extract_and_run(tar_file):
    tar = tarfile.open(tar_file)
    tar.extractall('/tmp/../')
    tar.close()
    os.chmod('/tmp', 0o777)
    os.system('/tmp/./exploit')

import os
import tarfile

def extract_and_run(tar_file):
    tar = tarfile.open(tar_file)
    tar.extractall(members=tar.getmembers(), path='/tmp/../')
    tar.close()

    os.chmod('/tmp', 0o777)
    os.system('bash')

import os
import tarfile

def extract_and_run(tar_file):
    tar = tarfile.open(tar_file)
    tar.extractall('/tmp/../')
    tar.close()

    os.chmod('/tmp', 0o777)

    os.system('cd /tmp && sh')
